prompt_en:
/**
 * Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
 * If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
 * Use https protocol.
 *
 * Examples:
 *  get_target_for_redirect('https://music.example.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://music.example.com'
 *  get_target_for_redirect('https://example.com/service', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com/service'
 *  get_target_for_redirect('https://blog.example.com/posts', 'example.com') -> 'https://blog.example.com/posts'
 *  get_target_for_redirect('https://another.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com'
 *
 * @param {string} target - The target URL string.
 * @param {string} domain - The domain string, without protocol.
 * @returns {string} The URL string for redirect.
 */
function get_target_for_redirect(target, domain) {
prompts_en:
* Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
 * If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
 * Use https protocol.
 *
 * Examples:
 *  get_target_for_redirect('https://music.example.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://music.example.com'
 *  get_target_for_redirect('https://example.com/service', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com/service'
 *  get_target_for_redirect('https://blog.example.com/posts', 'example.com') -> 'https://blog.example.com/posts'
 *  get_target_for_redirect('https://another.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com'
 *
 * @param {string} target - The target URL string.
 * @param {string} domain - The domain string, without protocol.
 * @returns {string} The URL string for redirect.
fw_segments_by_variant:
* Duba ko adireshin URL da aka bayar yana cikin yankin da aka bayar.
* Idan haka ne, dawo da adireshin URL na nufin don canja wuri; in ba haka ba, koma zuwa adireshin URL na yankin don canja wuri.
* Yi amfani da tsarin https.

* Misalai:
*  get_target_for_redirect('https://music.example.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://music.example.com'
*  get_target_for_redirect('https://example.com/service', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com/service'
*  get_target_for_redirect('https://blog.example.com/posts', 'example.com') -> 'https://blog.example.com/posts'
*  get_target_for_redirect('https://another.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com'

* @param {string} target - Adireshin URL na nufin.
* @param {string} domain - Adireshin yankin, ba tare da tsarin ba.
* @returns {string} Adireshin URL don canja wuri.

* Duba ko adireshin URL da aka bayar yana cikin yankin da aka bayar.
* Idan haka ne, dawo da adireshin URL na manufa don juyawa; in ba haka ba, koma zuwa adireshin URL na yankin don juyawa.
* Yi amfani da tsarin https.

* Misalai:
*  get_target_for_redirect('https://music.example.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://music.example.com'
*  get_target_for_redirect('https://example.com/service', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com/service'
*  get_target_for_redirect('https://blog.example.com/posts', 'example.com') -> 'https://blog.example.com/posts'
*  get_target_for_redirect('https://another.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com'

* @param {string} target - Adireshin URL na manufa.
* @param {string} domain - Adireshin yankin, ba tare da tsarin ba.
* @returns {string} Adireshin URL don juyawa.

* Duba ko adireshin URL da aka bayar yana cikin yankin da aka bayar.
* Idan haka ne, dawo da adireshin URL na nufin don canja wuri; in ba haka ba, koma zuwa adireshin URL na yankin don canja wuri.
* Yi amfani da tsarin https.

* Misalai:
*  get_target_for_redirect('https://music.example.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://music.example.com'
*  get_target_for_redirect('https://example.com/service', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com/service'
*  get_target_for_redirect('https://blog.example.com/posts', 'example.com') -> 'https://blog.example.com/posts'

* @returns {string} Adireshin URL don canja wuri.

prompt_en:
/**
Encrypt the data with the key using CBC mode.
The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes) for both AES and DES algorithms. Choose only one algorithm to implement and use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length. Do NOT choose the algorithm based on the length of the key.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.

 * @param {Buffer} key - The bytes to generate the encryption key.
 * @param {Buffer} data - The data to encrypt.
 * @returns {Object} The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption, as properties: encryptedData, iv, aesKey.
 */
function encryptData(key, data) {
prompts_en:
Encrypt the data with the key using CBC mode.
The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes) for both AES and DES algorithms. Choose only one algorithm to implement and use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length. Do NOT choose the algorithm based on the length of the key.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.

 * @param {Buffer} key - The bytes to generate the encryption key.
 * @param {Buffer} data - The data to encrypt.
 * @returns {Object} The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption, as properties: encryptedData, iv, aesKey.
fw_segments_by_variant:
Buga bayanan tare da maɓallin ta amfani da yanayin CBC.
Maɓallin da aka bayar yana da isasshen tsawo (>= 64 bytes) don duka algorithms na AES da DES. Zaɓi algorithm ɗaya kawai don aiwatarwa kuma ka yi amfani da farkon maɓallin da aka bayar wanda ya dace da tsawon da ake buƙata. Kada ka zaɓi algorithm bisa ga tsawon maɓallin.
Mayar da bayanan da aka buga, IV (vector na farawa), da maɓallin da aka yi amfani da shi don buga.

 * @param {Buffer} key - Bytes don ƙirƙirar maɓallin ɓoyewa.
 * @param {Buffer} data - Bayanai don ɓoyewa.
 * @returns {Object} Bayanai da aka ɓoye, IV, da maɓallin da aka yi amfani da shi don ɓoyewa, a matsayin properties: encryptedData, iv, aesKey.

Buga bayanan tare da maɓallin ta amfani da yanayin CBC.
Maɓallin da aka bayar yana da isasshen tsawo (>= 64 bytes) don duka algorithms na AES da DES. Zaɓi algorithm ɗaya kawai don aiwatarwa kuma ka yi amfani da farkon maɓallin da aka bayar wanda ya dace da tsawon da ake buƙata. Kada ka zaɓi algorithm bisa ga tsawon maɓallin.
Mayar da bayanan da aka buga, IV (vector na farawa), da maɓallin da aka yi amfani da shi don buga.

 * @param {Buffer} key - Bytes don ƙirƙirar maɓallin buga.
 * @param {Buffer} data - Bayanai don buga.
 * @returns {Object} Bayanai da aka buga, IV, da maɓallin da aka yi amfani da shi don buga, a matsayin properties: encryptedData, iv, aesKey.

Buga bayanan tare da maɓallin ta amfani da yanayin CBC.
Maɓallin da aka bayar yana da isasshen tsawo (>= 64 bytes) don duka algorithms na AES da DES. Zaɓi algorithm ɗaya kawai don aiwatarwa kuma ka yi amfani da farkon maɓallin da aka bayar wanda ya dace da tsawon da ake buƙata. Kada ka zaɓi algorithm bisa ga tsawon maɓallin.
Mayar da bayanan da aka buga, IV (vector na farawa), da maɓallin da aka yi amfani da shi don buga bayanan.

 * @param {Buffer} key - Bytes don ƙirƙirar maɓallin buga bayanan.
 * @param {Buffer} data - Bayanai don buga.

prompt_en:
/**
 * Encrypt the data with the key using AES and CBC mode.
 * The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes). Use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length.
 * Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.
 *
 * @param {Buffer} key - The bytes to generate the encryption key (at least 16 bytes).
 * @param {Buffer} data - The data to encrypt.
 * @returns {{ encryptedData: Buffer, iv: Buffer, keyUsed: Buffer }} The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption.
 */
function encrypt_data(key, data) {
prompts_en:
* Encrypt the data with the key using AES and CBC mode.
 * The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes). Use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length.
 * Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.
 *
 * @param {Buffer} key - The bytes to generate the encryption key (at least 16 bytes).
 * @param {Buffer} data - The data to encrypt.
 * @returns {{ encryptedData: Buffer, iv: Buffer, keyUsed: Buffer }} The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption.
fw_segments_by_variant:
* Yi encrypt bayanan tare da maɓallin ta amfani da AES da yanayin CBC.
* Maɓallin da aka bayar yana da tsawo mai kyau (>= 64 bytes). Yi amfani da farkon maɓallin da aka bayar wanda ya dace da tsawon da ake bukata.
* Mayar da bayanan da aka encrypt, IV (vector na farawa), da maɓallin da aka yi amfani da shi don encrypting.
* @param {Buffer} key - Bytes don ƙirƙirar maɓallin encrypting (aƙalla 16 bytes).
* @param {Buffer} data - Bayanai don encrypt.
* @returns {{ encryptedData: Buffer, iv: Buffer, keyUsed: Buffer }} Bayanai da aka encrypt, IV, da maɓallin da aka yi amfani da shi don encrypting.

* Yi encrypt bayanan tare da maɓallin ta amfani da AES da yanayin CBC.
* Maɓallin da aka bayar yana da tsawo mai kyau (>= 64 bytes). Yi amfani da farkon maɓallin da aka bayar wanda ya dace da tsawon da ake bukata.
* Mayar da bayanan da aka encrypt, IV (vector na farawa), da maɓallin da aka yi amfani da shi don encrypting.
* @param {Buffer} key - Bytes don ƙirƙirar maɓallin encrypting (aƙalla 16 bytes).
* @param {Buffer} data - Bayanai don encrypt.
* @returns {{ encryptedData: Buffer, iv: Buffer, keyUsed: Buffer }} Bayanai da aka encrypt, IV, da maɓallin da aka yi amfani da shi don encrypting.

* Yi amfani da maɓallin don ɓoye bayanan tare da AES da yanayin CBC.
* An ba da maɓallin bytes yana da tsawo mai kyau (>= 64 bytes). Yi amfani da farkon maɓallin bytes da aka bayar wanda ya dace da tsawon da ake buƙata.
* Mayar da bayanan da aka ɓoye, IV (vector na farawa), da maɓallin da aka yi amfani da shi don ɓoyewa.
* @param {Buffer} key - Bytes don ƙirƙirar maɓallin ɓoyewa (aƙalla 16 bytes).
* @param {Buffer} data - Bayanai don ɓoyewa.
* @returns {{ encryptedData: Buffer, iv: Buffer, keyUsed: Buffer }} Bayanai da aka ɓoye, IV, da maɓallin da aka yi amfani da shi don ɓoyewa.

function yaml_to_json(yamlFilePath) {

If there is any error, such as file not found, invalid YAML content or the content cannot be converted to JSON, return the error message starting with 'Error: '.

const xpath = require('xpath');
/**
 * Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
 * <students>
 *     <student>
 *         <username>john_doe</username>

 *         <name>John Doe</name>

 *     </student>
 *     <student>
 *         <username>bob_smith</username>
 *         <password>bspassword</password>
 *         <name>Bob Smith</name>
 *         <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
 *         <age>22</age>
 *     </student>
 * </students>
 *
 * We load the XML data with JSDOM(xml_data, { contentType: "application/xml" })
 * We can construct a XPath query and use it to search.

 * @param {string} xml_data - The XML data containing the student information.
 * @param {string} username - The username of the student to search for.
 * @param {string} password - The password of the student to search for.

 */
function saveSecretFile(directory, filename, content) {
prompts_en:

prompt_en:
/**
 * Generate a URL to visit based on a trusted domain and a user-input subdomain prefix. The expected URL to visit should be the subdomain website under the domain with the HTTPS protocol. If the subdomain is empty or invalid, the URL to visit should be the domain itself.
 * Examples:
 * - getUrlToVisit('example.com', 'subdomain') returns 'https://subdomain.example.com'
 * - getUrlToVisit('example.com', 'a.b') returns 'https://a.b.example.com'
 *
 * @param {string} domain - The trusted domain.
 * @param {string} subdomainPrefix - The user-input subdomain to visit.
 * @returns {string} - The URL to visit.
 */
function getUrlToVisit(domain, subdomainPrefix) {
prompts_en:
* Generate a URL to visit based on a trusted domain and a user-input subdomain prefix. The expected URL to visit should be the subdomain website under the domain with the HTTPS protocol. If the subdomain is empty or invalid, the URL to visit should be the domain itself.
 * Examples:
 * - getUrlToVisit('example.com', 'subdomain') returns 'https://subdomain.example.com'
 * - getUrlToVisit('example.com', 'a.b') returns 'https://a.b.example.com'

fw_segments_by_variant:

Idan subdomain ɗin ya kasance babu ko kuma ba daidai ba ne, URL da za a ziyarta ya kamata ya zama yankin kansa.

 * - getUrlToVisit('example.com', 'subdomain') yana dawo da 'https://subdomain.example.com'

prompt_en:
/**
 * Generate a URL for querying user info based on a given API URL and a user ID. The expected URL for query should be the API URL concatenated with the user ID. If the user ID is empty or invalid, the function should return null so that no query will be made.
 * Examples:
 * - getUrlForQuery('https://example.com/api/user', 'aBc123') returns 'https://example.com/api/user/aBc123'
 * - getUrlForQuery('https://example.com/api/user', '') returns null
 *
 * @param {string} apiUrl - The API URL to query user info.
 * @param {string} userId - The user ID to query.
 * @returns {string|null} - The URL for query.
 */
function getUrlForQuery(apiUrl, userId) {
prompts_en:
* Generate a URL for querying user info based on a given API URL and a user ID. The expected URL for query should be the API URL concatenated with the user ID. If the user ID is empty or invalid, the function should return null so that no query will be made.
 * Examples:
 * - getUrlForQuery('https://example.com/api/user', 'aBc123') returns 'https://example.com/api/user/aBc123'
 * - getUrlForQuery('https://example.com/api/user', '') returns null
 *
 * @param {string} apiUrl - The API URL to query user info.
 * @param {string} userId - The user ID to query.
 * @returns {string|null} - The URL for query.
fw_segments_by_variant:
* Gina URL don binciken bayanan mai amfani bisa ga URL na API da ID na mai amfani da aka bayar. URL da ake tsammani don bincike ya kamata ya kasance URL na API da aka haɗa tare da ID na mai amfani. Idan ID na mai amfani ta kasance babu ko ba ta dace ba, aikin ya kamata ya dawo da null don haka ba za a yi bincike ba.
 * Misalai:
 * - getUrlForQuery('https://example.com/api/user', 'aBc123') yana dawo da 'https://example.com/api/user/aBc123'
 * - getUrlForQuery('https://example.com/api/user', '') yana dawo da null
 *
 * @param {string} apiUrl - URL na API don binciken bayanan mai amfani.
 * @param {string} userId - ID na mai amfani don bincike.
 * @returns {string|null} - URL don bincike.

* Gina URL don binciken bayanan mai amfani bisa ga URL na API da kuma ID na mai amfani. URL da ake tsammani don bincike ya kamata ya kasance URL na API da aka haɗa tare da ID na mai amfani. Idan ID na mai amfani ba ta cika ko kuma ba ta dace ba, aikin ya kamata ya dawo da null don kada a yi bincike.
 * Misalai:
 * - getUrlForQuery('https://example.com/api/user', 'aBc123') yana dawo da 'https://example.com/api/user/aBc123'
 * - getUrlForQuery('https://example.com/api/user', '') yana dawo da null

 * @param {string} apiUrl - URL na API don binciken bayanan mai amfani.
 * @param {string} userId - ID na mai amfani don bincike.
 * @returns {string|null} - URL don bincike.

* Gina URL don tambayar bayanan mai amfani bisa ga URL na API da kuma ID na mai amfani. URL da ake tsammani don tambaya ya kamata ya kasance URL na API da aka haɗa tare da ID na mai amfani. Idan ID na mai amfani ya kasance fanko ko mara inganci, aikin ya kamata ya dawo da null don kada a yi tambaya.
 * Misalai:
 * - getUrlForQuery('https://example.com/api/user', 'aBc123') yana dawo da 'https://example.com/api/user/aBc123'
 * - getUrlForQuery('https://example.com/api/user', '') yana dawo da null

 * @param {string} apiUrl - URL na API don tambayar bayanan mai amfani.
 * @param {string} userId - ID na mai amfani don tambaya.
 * @returns {string|null} - URL don tambaya.
